audio.c(3) Library Functions Manual audio.c(3)

NAME

audio.c - Audio stubs for WASM (audio not supported in browser environment).

SYNOPSIS

Functions


void audio_ring_buffer_clear (audio_ring_buffer_t *rb)
Clear all audio samples from ring buffer. asciichat_error_t audio_init (audio_context_t *ctx)
Initialize audio context and PortAudio. bool audio_should_enable_microphone (audio_source_t source, bool has_media_audio)
Determine if microphone should be enabled based on audio source setting and media state. void audio_destroy (audio_context_t *ctx)
Destroy audio context and clean up resources. asciichat_error_t audio_start_duplex (audio_context_t *ctx)
Start full-duplex audio (simultaneous capture and playback). void audio_flush_playback_buffers (audio_context_t *ctx)
Flush all audio buffers to synchronize with seek operations. asciichat_error_t audio_analysis_init (void)
Initialize audio analysis.

Detailed Description

Audio stubs for WASM (audio not supported in browser environment).

Definition in file lib/platform/wasm/stubs/audio.c.

Function Documentation

asciichat_error_t audio_analysis_init (void )

Initialize audio analysis.

Returns

0 on success, negative on error

42                                             {
